title: [FIRRTL] PlusArgs Intrinsics lower to SystemVerilog with high impedance values

features.name: plusargs_value intrinsic lowering with format string
features.description: Code should include a FIRRTL intmodule with intrinsic = circt_plusargs_value and a FORMAT parameter
features.snippet:
intmodule Bar :
  output found : UInt<1>
  output result : UInt<32>
  intrinsic = circt_plusargs_value
  parameter FORMAT = "herp"

features.name: high_impedance_assignment_from_intrinsic_output
features.description: Code should include an assign statement with high-impedance value used as output connection from an intrinsic
